channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Celebrities and watchmakers converge at Geneva’s Watches and Wonders fair
item.description: The Watches and Wonders event in Geneva once again cemented its reputation as the premier global showcase for luxury watchmaking, drawing a mix of high-profile celebrities, industry leaders, and inter...

item.title: An Overview of the 2026 Turner Prize Nominees and Their Artistic Approaches
item.description: The 2026 Turner Prize shortlist has been met with observations that it is noticeably more cautious compared to past years. Unlike previous editions, this year's selection lacks older artists, painters...

item.title: US shipbuilding constraints raise fresh doubts over AUKUS submarine delivery timelines
item.description: The article reports growing concerns about delays in the AUKUS submarine program despite significant financial commitments from Australia and the United States. According to new analysis prepared for ...

item.title: Faith Leaders and Government Unite to Improve Family Health Services in Kenya
item.description: In Nairobi, a major initiative called the Interfaith National Hub on Family Health and Wellbeing has been launched to tackle persistent healthcare gaps in Kenya. Spearheaded by the Faith to Action Net...

item.title: Kenya Shuts Over 1,200 Health Facilities Amid SHA and NHIF Fraud Investigations
item.description: Health CS Aden Duale has confirmed that over 1,200 health facilities have been closed down as part of the government’s intensified efforts to fight fraud linked to the Social Health Authority (SHA) an...

item.title: Experts highlight expectations and challenges as Taiwo Oyedele becomes Nigeria’s Finance Minister
item.description: Economic experts don share their views on wetin Taiwo Oyedele appointment as Nigeria new Minister of Finance and Coordinating Minister of the Economy fit mean for the country. Dem point to im strong b...

item.title: Canadian Rangers test communications, technology, and operations during extended Arctic patrol along the Northwest Passage
item.description: A 52-day Canadian Ranger patrol covering approximately 5,200 kilometres along the Northwest Passage has highlighted both the human and technological challenges of operating in Canada’s Arctic. Led by ...

item.title: Opinion: Carney criticized for attributing domestic economic challenges to Trump amid housing and debt concerns
item.description: This opinion article argues that Prime Minister Mark Carney is deflecting responsibility for Canada’s domestic economic challenges by attributing them in part to U.S. President Donald Trump, rather th...

item.title: Vercel Reveals Pre-Hack Data Theft Impacting Some Customers
item.description: Vercel, the app and website hosting giant, disclosed that hackers had accessed some of its customers' data even before the company experienced its well-publicized data breach earlier this month. In a ...

item.title: Ancient Mummified Reptile Shows Earliest Rib-Based Breathing System
item.description: A mummified reptile from the early Permian period, approximately 289 million years old, has provided crucial insight into how vertebrates first adapted to life on land. The tiny lizard-like species, C...

item.title: Indian Nationals No Longer Need Airport Transit Visa for France Travel
item.description: In a significant development for Indian travellers, the Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) announced that Indian nationals transiting through France by air will no longer require an airport transit vi...

item.title: Two Women Killed in Ambush While Jogging in Lanao del Sur
item.description: On the morning of April 21, 2026, two women, Grace Ajim and Christine Caluyong, were tragically killed while jogging along a highway in Barangay Muntay, Kolambugan, Lanao del Norte. The attack occurre...

item.title: Asake set to drop fourth album 'M$NEY' on May 1 with 13 tracks
item.description: Na wetin Asake fans don dey wait for don finally land. The Nigerian superstar don announce say him go drop him fourth album wey dem dey call 'M$NEY' on May 1, 2026. The album get 13 tracks and e go ca...

item.title: Mike Sonko's Daughter Janet Nyamu Engaged to Elvis, Family Celebrates
item.description: Mike Sonko and his wife Primrose Mbuvi are overjoyed after their daughter, Janet Nyamu, got engaged to her partner Elvis. The couple attended the engagement ceremony, with Primrose posting heartfelt m...

item.title: PwC fined and suspended from new audit work following Hong Kong investigation into Evergrande audits
item.description: PricewaterhouseCoopers (PwC) has reached a significant settlement with Hong Kong regulators following an investigation into its auditing role in relation to the collapsed property giant China Evergran...

item.title: Hamilton police search for 18-year-old who escaped custody
item.description: Hamilton police are actively searching for 18-year-old Sultan Aldarwish, who reportedly escaped police custody overnight on Thursday in the area of Main Street East and Grant Avenue. Aldarwish had bee...

item.title: President Ramaphosa Addresses the Nation with Acting Police Minister Cachalia at the Union Buildings
item.description: On Thursday, 23 April 2026, President Cyril Ramaphosa delivered a national address from the Union Buildings in Tshwane. Joining him was Acting Police Minister Firoz Cachalia. The address comes amid on...

item.title: Four new chameleon species discovered in Mozambique’s sky islands threatened by rapid forest destruction
item.description: Researchers carrying out long-term biodiversity expeditions in northern Mozambique have discovered four previously unknown species of forest-dwelling chameleons in isolated mountain ecosystems known a...

item.title: PM Shehbaz meets Pakistani astronaut candidates for China space mission, highlights new era of space research
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif met two Pakistani astronaut candidates, Zeeshan Ali and Khurram Daud, who have been selected for China’s manned space programme. During the meeting at the Prime Minister’...

item.title: Second week in a row PTI leaders skip court‑ordered visit to meet Imran at Adiala jail
item.description: Isamabad mein doosri bar paasay waqt PTI ke zamania ke hetamilale ne Adiala jail meinformer prime minister Imran Khan say milnay ka court‑mandated din, jisay normally Tuesdays aur Thursdays rakhtha ja...
